beats.narration_text: Sawadee. A learner asks: build me an interactive simulation of robertson bound on the bloch sphere. One Claude prompt. Here is what comes back.

props.command: build me an interactive sim of robertson bound on the bloch sphere
output: ✓ Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere

beats.narration_text: Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere is one of those ideas that is easier to see than to state. the core behaviour of robertson bound on the bloch sphere. This simulation makes that visible — and every educator can build one.
beats.new_visual_element: Concept card: Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Concept card: Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere

beats.narration_text: Here is the prompt. One message to Claude.
beats.code_snippet: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript.  Verify: the key behaviour of robertson bound on the bloch sphere. Palette: background #FFFFFF, ink #2A1A0E, accent #C8102E.

props.command: Build a single-file interactive HTML simulation of Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere. Use D3.js from CDN. All physics computed in-browser JavaScript.  Verify: the key behaviour of robertson bound on

beats.narration_text: Claude returns a single-file HTML. Here is the heart of it — the integrator and the slider handler. No server. No build step. One file, everything in the browser.
beats.code_snippet: // Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere — core physics
beats.new_visual_element: Onda code-block: core JS (integrator + slider handler)
beats.prompt: Show the core physics loop from qm2-robertson-bloch-heatmap.html

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Show the core physics loop from qm2-robertson-bloch-heatmap.html

beats.narration_text: At the default settings: robertson bound on the bloch sphere. Watch what the simulation shows.
Now drag main control. Watch the physics respond in real time.
beats.new_visual_element: Slate: narrate slider sweep of main control

build.suggested: suggested prompt: Slate: narrate slider sweep of main control

beats.narration_text: the prediction holds — robertson bound on the bloch sphere behaves as the equations say. Exactly as the equations predict.
One prompt. A live demonstration of robertson bound on the bloch sphere. For educators: every concept in your course can have one of these. Claude builds it; you judge it; your students explore it.
Open this file in your browser and drag the controls. Or ask Claude to add a second parameter, change the palette, or explain the physics step by step alongside the simulation.
Take this prompt, run it on your own topic. Your turn.
beats.code_snippet: Take this Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere simulation and add a second slider that controls View. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.

props.command: Take this Robertson Bound on the Bloch Sphere simulation and add a second slider that controls View. Show how changing it reveals a new aspect of the physics. Keep the single-file format and D3 CDN.
